title: Open field test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a1421","text":"The open field test is a simple test to evaluate general motor and explorative behavior in rodents ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place the animal in the center of open field cylindrical arena (100 cm diameter) with dark walls (35 cm) and floor, under dim lighting (300 lux)
Habituate the animal for 1 h to the testing room before the test
Leave the animal free to explore the arena for 10min and record with a video camera suspended above the arena
Track the center and the periphery with video tracking software (EthoVision - Noldus, The Netherlands)
Clean the apparatus every time between animals
creator: Nicola Biagio Mercuri
